subcodes.first_line: O thou who art longing to witness the lights from the Beauty of El-Abha! Thy letter reached me at this moment and I was rejoiced at thine excellent words
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @love of God, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @firmness in the Covenant, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
